category_sources: source_facts.description says API simulations for development and testing; official Hoverfly docs describe it as an open-source API simulation tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is hoverfly; official docs and homepage brand it as Hoverfly.
docs_sources: Official dedicated docs domain docs.hoverfly.io is available and preferred; official homepage links to Documentation and describes the open-source Hoverfly platform.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/SpectoLabs/hoverfly; repo not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Hoverfly docs list API simulation, simulations, proxy/webserver modes, hoverctl, REST API, native bindings, and testing use cases.
